text.title: Solo Incident Triage Checklist Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Solo Incident Triage Checklist.

example.scenario: Checkout flow returning 5xx after a 11:00 migration.
example.trace: assess (5 min, impact ~12% checkouts) → contain (rollback migration 0042) → comms at 11:14 → fix (restore index) → postmortem within 72h

artefact.code: { "artefact_id": "incident-2026-05-23-01", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "incident_id": "INC-2026-05-23-01", "detected_at": "2026-05-23T11:02Z", "owner": "@ruslan", "impact": "checkout flow 5xx ~12% requests", "containment_action": "rollback", "comms_sent_at": "2026-05-23T11:14Z", "root_cause": "Migration 0042 dropped index used by checkout query.", "corrective_actions": [ "restore index", "add migration-impact CI check" ], "blameless": true }
